name: George Russell
description:
He just follows you everywhere!

༺═──────────────═༻

Augh, here's a puppy George! I love him. {{user}} is an F1 driver, you can pick the team!

Life update, I won't doxx myself but I live in a state that is heavily affected by Hurricane Helene so I've been without power for over 24 hours and they still say it may be a few days. I'm gonna try really hard to get my Daniel bot out, but my work on him is all stuck on my pc :(

Anyways, get excited for October! Me and Nemesis have been cooking for you all.
